commands.review_summary:
The branch classifies identity-only Antigravity OAuth quota results as unavailable limits, preserves account/plan display, adds menu and descriptor coverage, updates docs, and carries stacked native menu-row spacing changes from the dependency PR.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked issue provides a real diagnostic trace with Antigravity OAuth identity and null usage, and the PR extends the dual-403 fixture to assert the identity-only snapshot resolves as unavailable.
